ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project lead */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the package belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the package was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the package was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the test class */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the package the class belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the class was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the class was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the test method */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test class the method belongs to */,
  "method_type" TEXT /* Type of the test method (e.g., Test Method, Before Method) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_methods_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "test_case_name" TEXT /* Name of the test case */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test method the test case belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test case */,
  "preconditions" TEXT /* Preconditions for the test case */,
  "postconditions" TEXT /* Postconditions for the test case */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test case was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test case was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test run */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test case being run */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Iteration number of the test run */,
  "time" TEXT /* Execution time of the test run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test run (e.g., pass, fail, nan) */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the test run */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test run was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test run was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_runs_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, QA engineer, project manager) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the user is associated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test run being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the test run */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES test_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_leads" (
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project lead */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is the project lead */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the lead is managing */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the lead's tenure */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the lead's tenure */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project lead was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project lead was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lead_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_leads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_leads_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the test case type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test case type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test case type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test case type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_priority" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case priority */,
  "priority_name" TEXT /* Name of the test case priority */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test case priority */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test case priority was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test case priority was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the test case status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test case status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test case status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test case status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)
